name: Fintech
description: Data-dense dark-mode financial terminal optimized for real-time market data. Deep dark backgrounds with indigo and cyan accents. Monospace numbers, tight spacing, and minimal motion for professional trading and analytics interfaces.

decorators.fin-card: Dark card with 1px border, no shadow. Minimal surface separation for data-dense layouts.
decorators.fin-metric: Large monospace number with optional inline sparkline. Tabular-nums for alignment in data grids.
decorators.fin-table: Dense table with alternating row tints and tight padding. Optimized for financial data scanning.
decorators.fin-ticker: Horizontal scrolling ticker strip for real-time price data. Color-coded gain/loss values.
decorators.fin-alert: Top-border severity stripe with dark tinted background. Compact for dense dashboard layouts.
decorators.fin-surface: Dark layered background with subtle depth. Creates visual hierarchy in data-heavy interfaces.
decorators.fin-chart: Chart container with subtle grid lines and dark background. Optimized for financial chart overlays.
decorators.fin-badge: Compact monospace badge for status and values. Minimal padding, tabular-nums.
decorators.fin-input: Dark input with minimal 1px border. Compact styling for trading interfaces and data entry.

dashboard.description: Trading dashboard with multi-panel layout. Real-time charts, order books, positions, and ticker.

analytics.description: Financial analytics with dense data tables, comparison charts, and metric grids.

auth.description: Minimal dark authentication with centered card. Professional and secure appearance.

marketing.description: Fintech marketing page with dark hero, data visualization showcases, and feature grids.

fin-card.description: Dark card with 1px border, no shadow. Minimal surface separation for data-dense layouts.
fin-card.intent: Use for all content containers in financial interfaces. The borderline-only approach maximizes density while maintaining visual separation. No shadow keeps the interface flat and professional.

fin-metric.description: Large monospace number with optional inline sparkline. Tabular-nums for alignment in data grids.
fin-metric.intent: Use for key financial values: prices, P&L, portfolio totals. Monospace ensures column alignment in grids; large size enables quick scanning.

suggested_properties.font-family: ui-monospace, 'Cascadia Code', 'Source Code Pro', Menlo, monospace

fin-table.description: Dense table with alternating row tints and tight padding. Optimized for financial data scanning.
fin-table.intent: Use for transaction histories, order books, positions, and any tabular financial data. Alternating tints aid row scanning; tight padding maximizes data density.

fin-ticker.description: Horizontal scrolling ticker strip for real-time price data. Color-coded gain/loss values.
fin-ticker.intent: Use as a header or footer strip showing real-time market data. The scrolling motion conveys live data; green/red coloring shows direction at a glance.

fin-alert.description: Top-border severity stripe with dark tinted background. Compact for dense dashboard layouts.
fin-alert.intent: Use for trade alerts, risk warnings, and system notifications. The top border provides severity indication without consuming horizontal space.

fin-surface.description: Dark layered background with subtle depth. Creates visual hierarchy in data-heavy interfaces.
fin-surface.intent: Use as the root background for financial applications. The deep dark tone reduces eye strain during extended trading sessions and makes data colors pop.

fin-chart.description: Chart container with subtle grid lines and dark background. Optimized for financial chart overlays.
fin-chart.intent: Use for all chart and graph containers. The subtle grid lines aid data reading without competing with chart data. Dark background maximizes chart color contrast.

fin-badge.description: Compact monospace badge for status and values. Minimal padding, tabular-nums.
fin-badge.intent: Use for inline status indicators and small data labels. Monospace ensures consistent width for dynamic values like percentages and prices.

fin-input.description: Dark input with minimal 1px border. Compact styling for trading interfaces and data entry.
fin-input.intent: Use for all form inputs in trading and analytics interfaces. Compact sizing fits dense layouts; dark styling maintains immersion.
